commit.message:
feat: wire real Azure integrations — close 6 integration gaps

Storage Mode Factory (#34):
- Central factory (infrastructure/factory.py) switches memory/azure based on config
- storage_mode='memory' → InMemory repos (default, for dev/tests)
- storage_mode='azure' → SQL repos with DatabaseAdapter

SQL Repositories (#25):
- SqlSubmissionRepository, SqlPolicyRepository, SqlClaimRepository, SqlComplianceRepository
- All use parameterized queries against deployed Azure SQL schema
- All API endpoints now use factory-provided repos instead of hardcoded InMemory

Foundry Agent Integration (#30):
- FoundryAgentClient calls deployed agents via Responses API with agent_reference
- InsuranceAgent.execute_with_foundry() tries Foundry first, falls back to local
- Orchestrator chains Foundry calls for multi-agent workflows
- New POST /submissions/{id}/process endpoint for full Foundry workflow

Compliance Persistence (#31):
- SqlComplianceRepository for decision_records and audit_events tables
- InMemoryComplianceRepository with matching interface for dev mode
- Both wired via factory

Dashboard Real API (#33):
- USE_MOCK configurable via VITE_USE_MOCK env var
- Production build (.env.production) uses real API
- All API calls wrapped in try/catch with mock fallback
- Paginated response handling

Quality: 275 tests passing, ruff clean, bandit clean, dashboard builds.

Purge dashboard entries older than 14 days (#304)

* Purge dashboard entries older than 14 days

When updating plugin JSON files, filter out Quality and Efficiency
entries whose date is older than 14 days. If all entries are purged,
delete the JSON file so it is excluded from the components.json
manifest and no longer appears in the dashboard.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Move stale file cleanup to workflow level

Address review feedback: the delete-if-empty branch in the script was
unreachable because fresh entries are always appended before purging.
Instead, add a workflow step that scans all existing data files after
per-plugin generation and removes any whose entries are entirely older
than 14 days.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Move stale file purge logic into the script

Add a -PurgeStaleFiles/-DataDir parameter set so the workflow calls
the script instead of duplicating the retention logic inline. The
retention window is defined once in the script.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Make retention days configurable via workflow env var

Add -RetentionDays parameter to the script (mandatory for
-PurgeStaleFiles, optional for generate mode) and define
DASHBOARD_RETENTION_DAYS env var at the workflow level so the value
is controlled in one place.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Fix workflow comment to accurately describe the purge behavior
- Guard against missing 'entries' key in purge mode to avoid silently
  skipping malformed plugin JSON files

commit.message:
fix: guard against null IDENTIFIER tokens from ANTLR4 error recovery

ANTLR4 error recovery can produce declaration nodes with null IDENTIFIER
terminal tokens (e.g. when a function parameter list has a trailing comma
before the closing paren). SemanticAnalyzer now null-guards all such
dereferences to prevent NullReferenceException (CS8785) in the source
generator when processing scripts with commented-out parameters.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Remove Send from Entry/LruEntry, relax Sync bounds (#34)

* Initial plan

* Remove Send impl from Entry/LruEntry, relax Sync bounds, bump version to 0.2.1

Entry and LruEntry are RAII lock guards that should not be Send (similar to
MutexGuard). The Sync impl only needs K: Sync + V: Sync since sharing &Entry
only involves shared references, not ownership transfer.

commit.message:
[refactor](expr) Replace Expr.toThrift() and normalize() with visitor pattern (#61165)

Replace toThrift(TExprNode) and normalize(Normalizer) methods in Expr
and all 39 subclasses with ExprToThriftVisitor and ExprNormalizeVisitor,
following the same visitor pattern used for toSql() in commit
ac3ff9173d.

Key changes:
- Create ExprToThriftVisitor with 39 visitXxx methods + static
treeToThrift/treesToThrift utilities
- Create ExprNormalizeVisitor in planner.normalize package with custom
SlotRef/FunctionCallExpr handling
- Remove toThrift(), treeToThrift(), treesToThrift(), normalize(),
opcode field, getOpcode() from Expr.java
- Remove TExprOpcode from
ArithmeticExpr/BinaryPredicate/CompoundPredicate/MatchPredicate Operator
enums
- Update ~60 call sites across planner, datasource, nereids, and qe
packages
- Move SearchPredicate thrift helpers (buildThriftParam,
buildDslAstExplainLines) to visitor
- Update external getOpcode() callers to use BinaryPredicate.Operator
directly
- Add ExprToThriftBehaviorTest (18 tests) covering representative Expr
types

After this change, Expr and its subclasses have zero dependencies on
org.apache.doris.planner.normalize.Normalizer and thrift types used
solely for serialization (TExprNode, TExprNodeType, TExprOpcode, etc).

commit.message:
fix: extend clang-tidy hook to cover .h files; replace deprecated C headers (#16)

The clang-tidy pre-commit hook used pattern \.(cpp|hpp|cc|hh|cxx|hxx)$
which excluded plain .h headers from direct analysis. The
modernize-deprecated-headers check only fires when the deprecated
#include is in the main translation unit being analyzed, so C-style
headers inside .h files were invisible to the hook.

- Expand clang-tidy files pattern to \.(c|h|cpp|hpp|cc|hh|cxx|hxx|inc)$
  (matches the existing clang-format hook pattern)
- audioparams.h: #include <assert.h> -> #include <cassert>
- value.h: #include <stdint.h> -> #include <cstdint>
           #include <string.h> -> #include <cstring>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix CI failures: Sidekiq::Stats autoload, Prosopite N+1 detections (#72)

* Initial plan

* Add blueprint specs for all 8 Blueprinter serializers

Create spec/blueprints/ directory with comprehensive RSpec tests covering
all views, computed fields, associations, nil edge cases, and collection
rendering for: AuditLogBlueprint, BlockchainTransactionBlueprint,
ClusterBlueprint, MaintenanceRecordBlueprint, OrganizationBlueprint,
TreeBlueprint, UserBlueprint, and WalletBlueprint.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add test coverage for uncovered controller branches

- Provisioning: gateway/tree registration, unknown device_type, non-forester 403, validation errors
- Sessions: logout success and unauthenticated logout 401
- SystemHealth: Sidekiq/database error handling, response structure keys
- Notifications: update failure with invalid phone_number
- Settings: nil logo_url, organization update failure
- Dashboard: LOW_RESERVE and STABLE energy status branches
- OracleVisions: stream_config response structure verification

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add test coverage for uncovered branches in services and workers

Add 32 new tests across 10 spec files covering previously untested branches:
- AlertDispatchService: seismic anomaly, pest detection, attractor, fraud alerts
- HardwareKeyService: provision, rotate class method, device lookup
- EmergencyResponseService: no actuators, unknown alert_type, no coords, insert failure
- BlockchainMintingService: identifier_for forest_coin/carbon_coin with nil tree
- BlockchainBurningService: zero trees damage ratio, no AiInsight fallback
- InsightGeneratorService: zero sap baseline, z-value/temp penalties, fraud aggregation
- EcosystemHealingWorker: gateway as maintainable target
- InsurancePayoutWorker: fallback to non-active tree wallet
- TokenomicsEvaluatorWorker: lock_and_mint! returns nil
- ClusterHealthCheckWorker: explicit date parsing, breached contract counting

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix 13 failing tests, rubocop issues, and maintainable_label bug for Gateway

Bug fixes:
- Fix MaintenanceRecordBlueprint: use try(:did) for Gateway compatibility
- Fix SessionsController: add missing current_session method for logout

Test fixes:
- Fix blueprint specs: Blueprinter serializes decimals as strings
- Fix tree_blueprint_spec: stub tree_family instead of nil (validation)
- Fix user_blueprint_spec: use update_columns for password-less user
- Fix system_health_spec: mock Sidekiq::Stats (no Redis in CI)

Rubocop fixes:
- Fix RSpec/IteratedExpectation: use all() matcher
- Fix RSpec/ContextWording: prefix with when/with/without
- Fix RSpec/BeEq: use be() instead of eq() for simple values
- Fix RSpec/MessageChain: replace receive_message_chain with double
- Fix Layout/SpaceInsideArrayLiteralBrackets: add spaces

Co-authored-by: Alexey-Lukin <619149+Alexey-Lukin@users.noreply.github.com>

* Integrate Prosopite N+1 detection in request specs

Adds before/after hooks for request specs to scan for N+1 queries.
Prosopite is configured to raise in test mode (config/initializers/prosopite.rb).

Co-authored-by: Alexey-Lukin <619149+Alexey-Lukin@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add pg_query gem required by Prosopite for N+1 query detection

Prosopite depends on pg_query for SQL fingerprinting but the gem was
missing from the Gemfile, causing all 501 request/integration specs
to fail with LoadError when Prosopite.finish was called.

Co-authored-by: Alexey-Lukin <619149+Alexey-Lukin@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix 9 Prosopite N+1 query detection failures in CI

1. AuditLog: Wrap intentional chain hash queries in Prosopite.pause/resume
2. ContractsController: Eager load ews_alerts through cluster association
3. InsightGeneratorService: Batch prefetch per-tree telemetry stats
4. BlockchainMintingService: Use preloaded wallet mapping for iteration
5. Gateway lifecycle test: Load association to array before include? check

Co-authored-by: Alexey-Lukin <619149+Alexey-Lukin@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix 4 CI test failures: Sidekiq::Stats constant, N+1 queries

1. Add `require "sidekiq/api"` to SystemHealthController — Sidekiq 8.x
   does not autoload Sidekiq::Stats without explicit require.
2. Fix NaasContract#active_threats? to use Ruby-level filtering when
   ews_alerts are already eager-loaded, avoiding N+1 on the scoped query.
3. Fix blockchain batch minting test to use batch reload instead of
   individual .reload calls that trigger Prosopite N+1 detection.

Co-authored-by: Alexey-Lukin <619149+Alexey-Lukin@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: skip detail fetch for sold slugs in discover mode

In discover mode, sold slugs (~94K) previously triggered detail fetches
that all resulted in redirect_mismatch errors and took ~15 hours.

Changes:
- _collect_discovery_slugs() now returns (active_slugs, sold_slugs, ...)
  where active=for_sale+auction, sold separate (not fetched)
- New _push_status_update() bulk-marks sold slugs via API status-update
  endpoint without fetching their detail pages
- run_once() uses only active_slugs for detail phase, then calls
  _push_status_update for sold_slugs
- Tests updated for new 6-element tuple signature + new regression test

Expected discover time: hours -> ~15 min for active slug detail fetch

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
CI: use CMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH for Android Qt discovery

The Android NDK toolchain.cmake sets CMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH_MODE_PACKAGE=ONLY
which makes find_package() ignore CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH entirely. The correct
variable for Qt cross-compilation on Android is CMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH, as
shown in the Qt 6 Android documentation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Consolidate 13 inspections into 3 for performance

Merge all inspections into BehandlingInspection, AktivitetInspection,
and ProcessorInspection. Each class is now visited at most once instead
of up to 6 times, and directory/file scans happen at most once per class.

Same checks, same severity levels — just fewer UAST traversals.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
